title: Spinal Implants market to grow at a CAGR of 5.5 % during the forecast period (2025 – 2030): Wissen Research
author: Wissen Research
description: The global spinal implants market was valued at USD 11.5 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 15.8 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 5.5%. Growth is driven by an aging global population, rising traumatic injuries, and advancements in minimally invasive spine surgery. Spinal fusion devices dominate the market, while Asia Pacific is expected to show the highest growth rate during the forecast period.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a prominent industry player with sustained investment in spinal fusion segment innovation, indicating strong market position and growth potential.
Highlighted as a key industry player focused on technological innovation in the spinal fusion segment, demonstrating competitive strength in the growing market.
Announced FDA approval for a non-fusion scoliosis correction system in 2024, demonstrating innovation and expansion into new surgical approaches within the spinal implants market.

title: Pedicle Screw Systems Market Size to Hit USD 3.71 Billion by 2033, Growing at a CAGR of 5.76% - SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global Pedicle Screw Systems Market is projected to grow from $2.38 billion in 2025 to $3.71 billion by 2033, with a 5.76% CAGR, driven by rising spinal disorder prevalence and technological advancements in spine surgery.

title: Expedia, Sandisk and Penumbra Are Among the Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (Nov. 3-Nov. 7): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
author: Nabaparna Bhattacharya
description: Multiple large-cap companies reported strong Q3 earnings and raised fiscal year guidance, leading to significant stock price gains across various sectors including technology, travel, and healthcare.

title: Globus Medical Announces Leadership Transitions and Preliminary Second Quarter 2025 Sales Results
author: Globus Medical, Inc.
description: Globus Medical announced leadership transitions, with Keith Pfeil becoming President and CEO, replacing Dan Scavilla. Kyle Kline was appointed as the new CFO. The company reported preliminary Q2 2025 sales of $745.3 million, an 18.4% increase from the previous year.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Positive leadership transition with internal promotion, strong Q2 sales growth, and reaffirmed annual revenue guidance indicate organizational stability and growth potential

title: Intramedullary Nail Market size to worth USD 1,537 Million by 2032, says Coherent Market Insights
author: Coherent Market Insights
description: The global intramedullary nail market is expected to grow rapidly, driven by the rising incidence of bone fractures, particularly among the aging population, and advancements in surgical techniques. However, the market faces challenges such as high procedural costs, the need for skilled professionals, and competition from alternative fixation devices.
